description_long: This object is a heavily crushed aluminum beverage can, predominantly green in color with white and silver accents. The can is flattened and contorted, with its top and bottom ends bent inward and overlapping, exposing the pull tab and rim from multiple angles. The surface is covered in printed graphics, including a barcode and some partially visible text, suggesting it was once a branded drink container. The can's exterior shows signs of dirt and grime, especially along the base and creases, indicating it has been discarded and exposed to the elements. The pull tab remains attached and is of the standard ring pull type, though the can's body is significantly deformed. The overall appearance is that of a typical piece of street litter found in urban environments.
description: A crushed, green aluminum beverage can with a standard pull tab, visible branding, and signs of dirt and wear. The can is flattened and contorted, showing both the top and bottom ends.
description_view_0: The can is seen from an angle highlighting both the top and bottom ends, with the pull tab and rim clearly visible and the body heavily crumpled.
description_view_1: This view shows the can from the side, emphasizing the flattened profile and the way the top and bottom are pressed together, with the green label and some text visible.
description_view_2: The can is viewed from the opposite side, revealing the barcode and more of the label, as well as the pronounced creases and folds in the aluminum.
description_view_3: A close-up of the can's top end, with the pull tab and rim dominating the view, and the barcode partially visible along the side.
attribute_brand_logo: A partially visible circular logo with white and red elements on a green background, possibly a beverage brand.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the side of the can, partially visible in views 2 and 3.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: The can is heavily dented and crushed, with visible dirt and grime along the base and creases, but no significant rust or corrosion.
